div.head:
No. 931
Editorial Note
div.p:
On July 19, the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development announced its first loan to Austria. This loan, equivalent to approximately $12 million, was to help finance the Reisseck–Kreuzeck hydroelectric power project under construction in
southern Austria. Regarding this loan, see Department of State Bulletin, August 9, 1954, page 210.
